negative_evidence: turboSETI completed on held-out HIP17147 HDF5 without valid hits at SNR >= 10
radio input validation correctly refused candidate scoring because the hit table has zero valid rows

method_reviews.reason: No valid hit rows were present for candidate feature extraction.
No candidate feature vector can be produced from a zero-hit held-out table.
Only one held-out target is populated, and it has no valid hit frequencies to compare across targets.
No hit morphology rows exist for density clustering.
No hit feature rows exist for scoring; scorer summary also reports no fitted training corpus.

open_blockers_after_run: Need at least one held-out DECISION-133 evidence stream with valid hit rows or an injection-recovery stream before independent candidate-level method comparison can close.
Need a production evidence bundle containing method outputs, disagreements, abstentions, and negative evidence from the same held-out evidence.
Need validate-all from the same checkout after any committed evidence-bundle changes.
conclusion: This run partially unblocks DECISION-134 by proving data/extended_corpus can be populated with current BL Open Data evidence and by preserving a real zero-hit negative result. It does not close DECISION-134 because independent candidate-level method comparison still lacks valid held-out hit rows.
